intro: Powered by a cutting-edge engine, deploy your tactics in a top-secret Middle East rescue mission! Hardcore tactical FPS through a war of betrayal and conspiracy!
description:
Built on the latest game engine, Shadow Trigger: Covert Ops delivers stunning high-quality 3D visuals and silky-smooth gameplay, dropping you right in the middle of howling desert sandstorms, choking gunpowder smoke, and bone-rattling blast waves. The oil-rich nation of Al-Sarat has been a battleground for decades, caught between the competing ambitions of global superpowers. When Western intelligence sends in a special forces unit to take out the leadership of extremist armed faction Jamala, the mission is already compromised before the first boot hits the ground. Ambushed by a precisely coordinated anti-air assault using advanced electronic warfare systems and MANPADS, the Black Hawk formation is brought down in the heart of the city, leaving survivors surrounded by thousands of hostile fighters. With official rescue operations shut down for political reasons, you are the only one sent in, covertly, to bring your squad home alive.

・Built on the latest game engine for high-quality 3D graphics and smooth, responsive combat action.
・Take on missions across authentically recreated Middle Eastern locations including desert canyons, occupied urban buildings, and night-time forward operating bases.
・Intense hardcore tactical FPS action played entirely from a first-person perspective.
・From covert night infiltrations to desperate urban breakouts, each mission delivers a distinct vibe and pulse-pounding tension.
・A massive arsenal including sniper rifles, assault rifles, SMGs, and anti-tank rockets, with tactical flexibility to match every situation.
・High mission freedom: choose your approach, from silent takedowns to all-out frontal assault.
・Tight, responsive controls built for everyone, from FPS newcomers to hardcore operators.

Nobody knows you're out there. Nobody's coming to help. As an elite special forces operative, hunt down the traitor, rescue your surrounded squad, and blow apart the insurgent conspiracy that turned an entire city into a kill zone. Every mission is a precision-crafted test of skill, grit, and instinct. Whether you make it out, whether you find the mole, whether you pull that final trigger, it's all on you.

Prologue
Al-Sarat is an oil-rich nation where a decades-long proxy war between global powers has finally hit its breaking point. What looked like the end of a civil war was nothing more than a brief silence before the storm. An unidentified militia, backed by a regional military power and bankrolled by a massive criminal cartel, has quietly leveled up into a professional fighting force armed with state-level electronic warfare systems and surface-to-air missile batteries.

Western intelligence sent in a Black Hawk formation to neutralize the leadership of Jamala, but the operation was burned before it even kicked off. The insurgents had been tracking the mission in real time, stacking anti-air ambush teams at every approach into the city. As the formation pushed into the canyon corridor, a MANPADS missile punched through the Black Hawk's countermeasures and nailed the tail rotor. The helicopter went down in a fireball over the city square.

This was no accident. It was the final piece of a carefully laid trap, pulling Western forces deep into the city to be used as pawns in a global information war. Thousands of armed fighters closed in on the crash site as all comms went dark. With the political blowback too big to risk a formal rescue, command makes one last call: send in special forces, off the grid, and get them out.
